description: A sturdy horn carved from bone with a brass mouthpiece.  Produces a deep, resonant tone that trained animals recognize as a command signal.  Tamed beasts nearby will hear it and switch between passive and aggressive behavior.

A sealed glass vial of concentrated synthetic insect pheromones.  Crack it open briefly and it puts out a burst of chemical signals that tamed arthropods interpret as a rallying call.  Nearby tamed creatures will switch between passive and aggressive behavior.  Close it fast to save the contents.

A handheld device that puts out a short electromagnetic pulse on frequencies robots and automated systems respond to.  Tamed machines read the signal as a priority command and switch between passive and aggressive behavior.  Short-range, but unmistakable to anything with a receiver.

A disturbing crystalline device that vibrates at frequencies partially outside normal space-time.  When activated, it puts out a resonance that tamed nether creatures can feel across dimensional boundaries.  They'll switch between passive and aggressive behavior.  Extended use may cause headaches and nosebleeds.

A carefully-made multi-frequency whistle that produces sounds spanning the full audible spectrum and beyond.  Combines ultrasonic tones, subsonic vibrations, pheromone dispersal, and a faint electromagnetic pulse.  When blown, ALL tamed creatures in the area will respond, switching between passive and aggressive behavior.
